commands.name: upload-front-end
commands.description: Update the front-end on the workspace with the content of the folder passed as input

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --token
options.description: Library Token, can be created on the workspace under Manage > Tokens > Library. The token can also be encrypted and stored locally with the store-token tool.

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to output folder from the compiled front-end. Example .\MyProject\bin\Debug\netstandard2.0\h5\

options.name: --auto-patch
options.description: If it should automatically patch instead of replacing all files

options.name: --ignore-certificate-errors
options.description: Ignore certificate errors

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout for requests in seconds. (default: 90 secs) [default: 90]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --token
options.description: Library Token, can be created on the workspace under Manage > Tokens > Library. The token can also be encrypted and stored locally with the store-token tool.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout for requests in seconds. (default: 90 secs) [default: 90]

commands.name: store-token
commands.description: Store the token for a given workspace locally. You can re-use the stored token by passing --token auto on other commands

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --token
options.description: Library Token, can be created on the workspace under Manage > Tokens > Library. The token can also be encrypted and stored locally with the store-token tool.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Serve locally a front-end project built with the Mosaik.FrontEnd nuget package

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to output folder from the compiled front-end. Example .\MyProject\bin\Debug\netstandard2.0\h5\

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the app, to be shown for example on the navbar of the UI [default: Mosaik]

options.name: --ignore-certificate-errors
options.description: Ignore certificate errors

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to bind locally [default: 5000]

options.name: --cert-file
options.description: Certificate file to bind, only required if binding to https

options.name: --cert-password
options.description: Certificate file password, only required if binding to https and if certificate is password protected

options.name: --listen-to-any
options.description: Pass if you would like to list to connections from any IP, instead of only connections from localhost

options.name: --enable-cors
options.description: Enable CORS on local hosting

options.name: --path-base
options.description: Base path to listen, default to none

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Inspect a folder for supported files, and return a summary.

options.name: --path
options.description: Folder to inspect before upload to the workspace

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: ingest-pst
commands.description: Upload emails extracted from a PST file

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --token
options.description: Library Token, can be created on the workspace under Manage > Tokens > Library. The token can also be encrypted and stored locally with the store-token tool.

options.name: --path
options.description: PST file to analyze and upload emails from to the workspace

options.name: --bandwidth
options.description: Maximum Bandwith in Mbps

options.name: --source
options.description: Name of the source, to be added to each file entry. The default is the file name of the specified file.

options.name: --upload-to
options.description: Where to store the file. Possible values are: Public, Group, UserPublic or UserPrivate [default: Public]

options.name: --target-uid
options.description: If you pass Group or UserPublic/UserPrivate to the --upload-to parameter, you need to also specify the UID of the Group/User

options.name: --ignore-folders
options.description: A semicolon (';') delimited list of case-sensitive folder names to skip (including any sub folders) - if not specified then a default set will be used but this may not cover all folders that should be bypassed if the folder names are translated into different languages

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout for requests in seconds. (default: 90 secs) [default: 90]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: upload-folder
commands.description: Upload a folder to the workspace

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --token
options.description: Library Token, can be created on the workspace under Manage > Tokens > Library. The token can also be encrypted and stored locally with the store-token tool.

options.name: --path
options.description: Folder to upload to the workspace

options.name: --bandwidth
options.description: Maximum Bandwith in Mbps

options.name: --fetch-server-state
options.description: Fetch the already synchronized files before starting a sync. This is required to make sure that files that are deleted locally are also deleted from the workspace.  Requires syncFileUrl

options.name: --restore-access-time
options.description: Restore last access date after reading file (only recomended for hot+cold storage network drives)

options.name: --source
options.description: Name of the source, to be added to each file entry. The default is the name of the directory of the given Path.

options.name: --upload-to
options.description: Where to store the file. Possible values are: Public, Group, UserPublic or UserPrivate [default: Public]

options.name: --target-uid
options.description: If you pass Group or UserPublic/UserPrivate to the --upload-to parameter, you need to also specify the UID of the Group/User

options.name: --extensions
options.description: Extensions to upload, split by ';' - example: --extensions doc;docx;pdf;

options.name: --root-path
options.description: Name of the root Path to be replaced by the root-folder-name in the workspace.

options.name: --root-folder-name
options.description: Name of the root folder created in the workspace. If none is given, the folders are created under the workspace root folder.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout for requests in seconds. (default: 90 secs) [default: 90]

options.name: --sync-file-url
options.description: Sync the file url to the workspace. Uploaded files then can be opened directly.

options.name: --in-place
options.description: ONLY Sync the file url to the workspace. Uploaded files then can be opened directly. The server needs direct access to the files to make them searchable. No files are copied.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --root-path
options.description: Name of the root Path to be replaced by the root-folder-name in the workspace.

options.name: --root-folder-name
options.description: Name of the root folder created in the workspace. If none is given, the folders are created under the workspace root folder.

commands.name: wait-for
commands.description: Wait for a workspace to be ready

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --ignore-certificate-errors

options.name: --max-timeout

options.description: Name of the root folder created in the workspace. If none is given, the folders are created under the workspace root folder.

commands.name: export-workspace-definitions
commands.description: Export custom code from the workspace: custom tasks, custom indexes, custom endpoints

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --token
options.description: Library Token, can be created on the workspace under Manage > Tokens > Library. The token can also be encrypted and stored locally with the store-token tool.

options.name: --export-path
options.description: Path to store the exported zip file (or output directory when unzip = true).

options.name: --unzip
options.description: If true, export to a directory by downloading the zip and extracting it.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: import-workspace-definitions
commands.description: Import custom code into the workspace: custom tasks, custom indexes, custom endpoints

options.name: --server
options.description: URL to reach the workspace, such as 'https://my-workspace.curiosity.ai/'.

options.name: --token
options.description: Library Token, can be created on the workspace under Manage > Tokens > Library. The token can also be encrypted and stored locally with the store-token tool.

options.name: --import-path
options.description: Path to a .zip file containing your workspace definitions (or directory when zip = true)

options.name: --zip
options.description: If true, zip the import directory before uploading it.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
